rationale: Mirrors TUI _build_final_config() verbatim and the existing install_source post-build idiom in _run_yes; only a new existing-config guard is needed. Scored 11/12 vs Option A 5/12.
rule: Option B — assemble config[documents] after build_config() returns
alternatives_rejected: Option A — add documents_categories choices-key to build_config() (restructures a deliberate boundary; no data-carrying-choices-key precedent)
